notableEvents.label: Riley Greene GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Riley Greene grounds into a double play, third baseman Brett Baty to second baseman Marcus Semien to first baseman Mark Vientos. Colt Keith out at 2nd. Riley Greene out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Zack Short plunked
notableEvents.detail: Zack Short hit by pitch. Spencer Torkelson to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Colt Keith GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Colt Keith grounds into a double play, first baseman Mark Vientos to shortstop Bo Bichette to first baseman Mark Vientos. Dillon Dingler out at 2nd. Colt Keith out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Zach McKinstry reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Mets challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was upheld: Zach McKinstry reaches on a fielding error by first baseman Mark Vientos.

notableEvents.label: Gage Workman pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Gage Workman lines out to right fielder Carson Benge.

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Carson Benge singles on a ground ball to center fielder Matt Vierling. A.J. Ewing scores.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Mets challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was upheld: Zach McKinstry reaches on a fielding error by first baseman Mark Vientos.
